name: Online Core Refactor
changes: Gated legacy online IIFE patches that wrapped the same timer/turn/display functions
Added single CronoGolOnlineCore controller for START, STOP, pull/apply state and RUNNING_REMOTE
Fixed service worker broken missing logo asset and cache install all-or-nothing behavior
Aligned SUPABASE_PRIVATE_ROOMS_SETUP.sql with state_json/app_version/last_seen_at used by code
Added audits for online core, service worker assets and Supabase schema consistency
